strategies.name: Fast banana B
strategies.description: Explode B through banana with fast utility.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: rush B banana flash over car smoke CT

meta.purpose: Beat banana control and get onto B before rotates

strategies.name: Banana take
strategies.description: Take banana first, then choose a B finish.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: take banana molly car smoke CT

meta.purpose: Secure banana control and force CT utility early

strategies.name: Apps short A
strategies.description: Split A through apartments and short.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: apps + short go A smoke moto + library

meta.purpose: Break A hold from two directions and cut rotates
notes: needs timing from apps and short

strategies.name: Fake banana to A
strategies.description: Show banana pressure, then rotate into A.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: [fake] banana smoke CT go A short

meta.purpose: Pull one or two CTs toward B before finishing A
goodWhen: enemy rotates fast off banana utility
notes: do not lose players in banana

strategies.name: A site hit
strategies.description: Simple A execute with core lane smokes.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: A site smoke moto + library flash over

meta.purpose: Isolate site defenders and deny arch rotate line

strategies.name: Silent apps pop
strategies.description: Walk apartments and burst balcony/site.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: [silent] apps popflash out balcony

meta.purpose: Catch A anchors without giving early rotate warning

strategies.name: Mid to B
strategies.description: Come through arch/CT pressure into B.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: mid to B smoke CT + coffins

meta.purpose: Punish overfocus on banana by attacking from lane rotation path

strategies.name: B site execute
strategies.description: Full B commitment with core site smokes.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: B site smoke CT + coffins flash over

meta.purpose: Take B with a simple, readable utility pattern

strategies.name: Delayed banana B
strategies.description: Stay hidden in banana and hit when the clock reaches one minute.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: hide banana till 1:00 then explode B smoke CT + coffins

meta.purpose: Punish early CT re-aggression or over-rotation
goodWhen: you want to draw A players off first

strategies.name: Second mid wrap A
strategies.description: Take second mid and wrap into A.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: take second mid apps + short go A smoke moto

meta.purpose: Avoid heavy banana and pressure A from layered routes
notes: works well with one late lurk top mid

strategies.name: Banana fake then apartments
strategies.description: Sell B presence and end A through apartments.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: show banana 2 then 5 apps go A smoke library

meta.purpose: Trigger B-heavy rotate and exploit thinner A defense

strategies.name: Fast lane A
strategies.description: Use lane pressure and quick A utility.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: fast lane smoke moto + library go A

meta.purpose: Beat delayed arch support and isolate site anchor
notes: flash over site helps first man

strategies.name: Triple banana
strategies.description: Three players contest banana at round start.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 3 B banana

meta.purpose: Deny T banana control and burn their utility
notes: do not overstay after gaining control
one can rotate out after utility

strategies.name: Banana push
strategies.description: Push down banana early for info or picks.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: push banana early

meta.purpose: Punish passive T starts and gain fast information

strategies.name: Double B hold
strategies.description: Standard two-player B hold.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 2 B hold

meta.purpose: Keep banana and site stable while A has enough support
notes: anchor and rotator roles should be clear

strategies.name: Arch short A
strategies.description: Two-point A defense from arch and short.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: arch + short A

meta.purpose: Trade A lane and apartments pressure from layered angles
notes: arch player must time rotate carefully

strategies.name: A stack
strategies.description: Gamble extra players on A.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: stack A

meta.purpose: Shut down repeated A site pressure
goodWhen: Ts hit A several rounds in a row

strategies.name: B retake setup
strategies.description: Delay B and retake with saved utility.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: retake B

meta.purpose: Avoid dying to layered B executes
goodWhen: your B anchor gets isolated often

strategies.name: Mid info push
strategies.description: Push for mid information early.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: mid push info

meta.purpose: Learn if Ts lean banana or second mid
goodWhen: you need info to rotate B support
notes: do not overextend into T spawn

strategies.name: Double apartments
strategies.description: Commit more pressure to apartments defense.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: double apps

meta.purpose: Punish repeated apps pops and wraps
goodWhen: A anchors struggle versus balcony bursts

strategies.name: Save crossfire
strategies.description: Protect economy with safer crossfires.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: save crossfire

meta.purpose: Avoid isolated duels when economy matters
notes: do not peek banana or lane alone

strategies.name: Car anti-rush
strategies.description: Use car and support to stop fast banana.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: car anti-rush banana

meta.purpose: Punish five-man banana bursts at the choke
notes: not ideal if Ts molly car every round

strategies.name: Pit anchor A
strategies.description: Play A around pit with delayed support.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: A hold pit + site

meta.purpose: Make lane/A bursts costly with deep anchor positions

strategies.name: Half-wall banana info
strategies.description: Fight for early banana info without full commit.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: half wall banana info then fall

meta.purpose: See early T numbers and preserve players
goodWhen: you want info but not a full banana battle
notes: do not get trapped by second wave nades
